name: Dr. Priya Sharma
text: WHS SoftTech transformed our clinic operations. Patient appointments increased by 300% and our staff efficiency doubled within the first month of launch.

name: Rajesh Kumar
text: The e-learning platform they built for us handles 10,000+ students seamlessly. The live class feature and progress tracking are exactly what we needed.

name: Anita Desai
text: Our online store revenue grew 4x after WHS rebuilt it. The checkout flow is seamless and the inventory management saves us hours every day.

name: Vikram Patel
text: The property listing portal they delivered is world-class. Our leads increased by 150% and the virtual tour feature sets us apart from every competitor.

name: Meera Nair
text: Booking management used to be a nightmare. Now clients book online 24/7, reminders go out automatically, and no-shows dropped by 60%. Incredible!

name: Arjun Singh
text: The AI chatbot they integrated handles 80% of our customer queries instantly. Our sales team can now focus on closing deals instead of answering basic questions.
